models.title: Compotite 24in. Tile-in Top Black ABS Linear Drain Cover Plate
source_fields:
• Allows for tile to inlay into the drain body creating a streamlined modern design for your shower floor
  • Reinforced tray fits directly into Compotite Linear Drain Body
  • Tray is removable for easy cleaning of drain body and integrated hair strainer (included)

models.title: Compotite 24in. Linear Drain Body Black ABS Linear Shower Drain
source_fields:
• High quality American made linear drains add modern style and functionality to any custom tile or stone shower installation
  • Plank pitch allows for large format tile or stone to be used on the shower floor
  • Proprietary internal step to support stainless steel Linear Drain Grate, Tile-Over Top or Tile-In Top (sold seperately)
  • 1 inch textured bonding flange makes for easy waterproofing installation (adds 2 inches to rough length of drain body-26 inches)
  • Integrated hair strainer comes with stainless steel Linear Drain Grate and Tile-In Top
  • ABS one-piece injection mold construction
  • Ideal for tub to shower conversions
  • Internal slope for superior drainage

models.title: Laticrete Hydro Ban 32 in. Offset Oval Tile-In Drain
source_fields:
The Laticrete Hydro Ban 32 in. Offset Oval Tile-In Drain brings modern elegance and reliable performance to shower installations. Crafted from heavy-duty stainless steel with a refined offset oval design, this drain provides superior flow and integrates seamlessly with Hydro Ban waterproofing systems for a sleek, minimalist look.

  • Handcrafted two-piece design: a trough and a polished steel grate sold separately
  • V-shaped trough enhances drainage efficiency, eliminating the need for multi-plane slopes
  • Allows the use of large-format tile with a single slope, speeding up installation
  • Made from heavy-duty 304 stainless steel, offering long-lasting resistance to wear and rust
  • Hydro Ban waterproofing membrane bonds directly to the stainless flange, simplifying installation
  • Compatible with standard vertical waste lines, side outlets, and threaded connectors for broad installation flexibility

Laticrete Hydro Ban 32 in. Offset Oval Tile-In Drain combines refined aesthetics with practical function—designed to simplify installation, accommodate large-format tile, and deliver lasting, water-tight performance.

models.title: Schluter Kerdi-Line 4ft. Vario Floral Linear Drain
source_fields:
Schluter-KERDI-LINE-VARIO is a versatile linear drain designed for tiled showers. Crafted from durable stainless steel, the channel and grate assembly can be cut to size on-site, ensuring a perfect fit for various shower dimensions. The polypropylene drain body includes PVC and ABS couplings, making installation straightforward. KERDI-LINE-VARIO boasts a sleek, 1-11/16 (43 mm) wide design and offers four stylish grate designs to complement modern tile trends.

  • Grate and channel assembly available in lengths of 4 and 8, customizable on-site.
  • Slim design only 1-11/16 (43 mm) wide.
  • Suitable for both wall-adjacent and center drain placement.
  • End caps provided for trimmed edges, ensuring a clean, finished look.
  • Four grate designs available in brushed stainless steel and nine Trendline colors Herringbone, Slant, Square, and Floral.

The flange kit includes an integrated KERDI collar for secure, waterproof connections, along with both PVC and ABS couplings. The flange can be positioned as needed to match the drainage outlet location. Note that the grate and channel kit, as well as the flange kit, must be purchased separately. Optional strainers and grate guards are available for simplified installation and system protection.

models.title: Schluter Kerdi-Line Frameless 48in. Tileable Grate
source_fields:
Schluter-KERDI-LINE is a sleek, low-profile linear shower drain designed specifically for bonded waterproofing assemblies. Ideal for showers, wet rooms, and other areas requiring effective waterproofing and drainage, KERDI-LINE can be installed near walls or at intermediate locations to create curbless, open-concept spaces.

  • Floors can be sloped on a single plane to KERDI-LINE, enabling the use of large-format tiles.
  • The channel body is made of formed stainless steel and features a KERDI collar for a secure waterproof connection.
  • Off-set and center outlets are available to meet various installation needs.
  • Accommodates all common thicknesses of ceramic tiles and stone coverings.
  • Available in lengths ranging from 20 (50 cm) to 72 (180 cm).
  • Grate assemblies are sold separately and come in seven unique designs.
  • Solid and Square grates can be used with the KERDI-LINE-FC for a seamless look when multiple drains are installed end-to-end.
  • Nine Trendline colors are now available for the Solid and Square grate designs.
  • The KERDI-LINE-TF grate features a thin stainless steel frame for enhanced tile protection and easy maintenance.

Enhance your professional projects with the versatile Schluter-KERDI-LINE, ensuring both style and functionality in every installation.

models.title: Schluter Kerdi-Line 4ft. Vario Matte Black Herringbone Linear Drain
source_fields:
Schluter Kerdi-Line 4ft. Vario Matte Black Herringbone Linear Drain is the perfect solution for residential and light commercial spaces. This sleek and stylish drain combines functionality with a modern design, ensuring your bathroom or shower area remains both beautiful and efficient.

  • Features a 48-inch length, ideal for creating a seamless look in larger showers.
  • Designed with a matte black herringbone pattern, adding a touch of elegance to any space.
  • Constructed by Schluter Systems, known for their high-quality and durable products.
  • Comes with a 10-year limited warranty, providing peace of mind and long-term reliability.
  • Suitable for both residential and light commercial use, offering versatile application options.

With its exceptional design and reliable performance, the Schluter Kerdi-Line 4ft. Vario Matte Black Herringbone Linear Drain is an excellent choice for anyone looking to enhance their bathroom's aesthetic while ensuring effective drainage.
